cards.code: static string Classify(double m) => m switch { < -40.0 => "Too low", >= -40.0 and < 0 => "Low", >= 0 and < 10.0 => "Acceptable", >= 10.0 and < 20.0 => "High", >= 20.0 => "Too high", double.NaN => "Unknown" }; System.Console.WriteLine(Classify(13)); System.Console.WriteLine(Classify(-100)); System.Console.WriteLine(Classify(5.7));
static bool IsLetter(char c) => c is (>= 'a' and <= 'z') or (>= 'A' and <= 'Z'); System.Console.WriteLine(IsLetter('Q')); System.Console.WriteLine(IsLetter('7'));
static bool Wrong(char c) => c is not >= 'a' and <= 'z'; static bool Right(char c) => c is not (>= 'a' and <= 'z'); System.Console.WriteLine(Wrong('{')); System.Console.WriteLine(Right('{'));
